zh.Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham於1394年2月24日出生在英國諾廷加姆爾安斯利時，她的父親Sir Hugh Annesley30歲，母親Benedicta de Babington34歲。她於1415年6月10日與William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham在英國英格蘭奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年11月29日在英國奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆享年82歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham于1394年2月24日出生在英国諾廷加姆爾安斯利时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Annesley30岁，母亲Benedicta de Babington34岁。她于1415年6月10日与William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham在英国英格兰奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年11月29日在英国奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆享年82岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾馬普萊度哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham was born on 24 February 1394, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Annesley, was 30 and her mother, Benedicta de Babington, was 34. She married William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham on 10 June 1415, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 29 November 1476, in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham est née le 24 février 1394, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Annesley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Benedicta de Babington, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham le 10 juin 1415, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 novembre 1476, à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham am 24. Februar 1394 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Annesley 30 und ihre Mutter Benedicta de Babington 34. Sie hat am 10. Juni 1415 in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. November 1476 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham è nata il il 24 febbraio 1394 nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Annesley, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Benedicta de Babington, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham il 10 giugno 1415, nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1476, nel Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurhamが1394年2月24日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Annesleyは30歳，母Benedicta de Babingtonは34歳であった。1415年6月10日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムでWilliam Lynde , Lord of Mapledurhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年11月29日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムで82歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアマプレドウルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham(이)가 1394년 2월 24일 영국 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Annesley(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benedicta de Babington(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1415년 6월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 11월 29일 영국 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 마플레더람에 묻혔다.

pt.24 February 1394–29 November 1476: 24 de fevereiro de 1394–29 de novembro de 1476
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham nasceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1394, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Annesley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta de Babington, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham em 10 de junho de 1415, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1476, em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham родилась 24 февраля 1394 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Annesley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Babington, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham 10 июня 1415 г. в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 29 ноября 1476 г. в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности мапледурам, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.24 February 1394–29 November 1476: 24 de febrero de 1394–29 de noviembre de 1476
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Annesley Lady of Mapledurham nació el 24 de febrero de 1394, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Annesley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Benedicta de Babington, tenía 34 años. Se casó con William Lynde , Lord of Mapledurham el 10 de junio de 1415, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1476, en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Mapledurham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
